_comments.geology_drops: Defines item drops per geology type. 'default' applies to all unspecified geologies. Each terrain type (wall/ramp) can have multiple drop entries with min/max quantity ranges.
_comments.geology_ticks: Base dig time in ticks per geology and terrain type. Wall is typically slower than ramp (or same).
_comments.tool_multipliers: Future: tool speed multipliers. 'none' = 1.0 (no tool, base speed). Lower values = faster.
_comments.geology_mapping: Future: map geology IDs to specific drop tables and tick overrides. E.g., iron ore veins drop hematite instead of generic boulder.
